zh.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby於1360年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾莫爾頓。她於1385年與Richard De Welby IV在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby于1360年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾莫爾頓。她于1385年与Richard De Welby IV在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Welby, one in Leicestershire and one in Lincolnshire. The Lincolnshire placename derives from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’. The Leicestershire placename is recorded as Alebi in 1086 and Welby in 1518, and derives from the Old Norse personal name Áli + Old Norse bý. The name is established in Ireland (Galway).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

nameMeanings.name: De

en.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby was born in 1360, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard De Welby IV in 1385, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1419, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby est née en 1360, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard De Welby IV en 1385, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1419, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby wurde 1360 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1385 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Richard De Welby IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1419 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby è nata il nel 1360 nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard De Welby IV nel 1385, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1419, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welbyは1360年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで生まれた。1385年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでRichard De Welby IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby(은)는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 모우턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Richard De Welby IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby родилась в 1360 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Welby IV в 1385 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1419 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret De Welby nació en 1360, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard De Welby IV en 1385, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
